sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ إِيمَانُ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ لِشِرَاءِ دَوَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: Iman je otišla u apoteku kupiti lijek.
sentences.translationEn: Iman went to the pharmacy to buy medicine.

sentences.translation: Farmaceut je pitao za ljekarsku uputnicu.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist asked about the prescription.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَتْهُ الوَصْفَةَ وَهُوَ أَحْضَرَ لَهَا الدَّوَاءَ.
sentences.translation: Dala mu je uputnicu i on joj je donio lijek.
sentences.translationEn: She gave him the prescription and he brought her the medicine.

sentences.translation: Iman je platila cijenu i zahvalila farmaceutu.
sentences.translationEn: Iman paid the price and thanked the pharmacist.
